title: centella montana
intro: Centella montana, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Hydrocotyle. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine and herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centella montana include improved cognitive function, enhanced skin health, and potential treatment for anxiety and stress. Centella montana can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or added to food products, and is also used in skincare products to promote healthy and youthful-looking skin.
